pi_items.source: Cross-referenced in setup_task.ps1 (line 26), export_result.ps1 (line 33), and verifier.py (line 58). All sources use identical template name for queries.

Verified in setup_task.ps1 (line 23) API parameter 'workitemtypename=Bug', verifier.py (line 65) checks 'work_item_type == "Bug"', and task description explicitly states 'Create a new Bug work item template'.
Consistent across task description, setup_azure_devops.ps1 (line 130) creates project 'TailwindTraders', and verifier.py (line 95) checks for 'TailwindTraders' in area path.
Task description specifies 'Priority: 2'. Verifier.py (line 77) checks 'if prio == "2" or prio == 2'.
Task description specifies 'Severity: 2 - High'. Verifier.py (line 86) checks 'if "2 - High" in str(severity)'.
Task description specifies 'Tags: 'frontend', 'needs-triage''. Verifier.py (lines 108-111) checks for both tags independently using substring matching.

Verifier.py line 127 defines: required_phrases = ["steps to reproduce", "expected result"]. The verifier explicitly does NOT check for 'Actual Result'. Line 134 feedback message confirms only these two sections are verified. Task description mentions all four items, but verifier enforcement differs.

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a work item template named 'Frontend Bug Report' for Bug work items in the TailwindTraders project. Expected field values are: Priority=2, Severity='2 - High', Area Path='TailwindTraders', Tags=['frontend','needs-triage']. Critical discrepancy: Metadata claims required_description_text includes 'Actual Result', but the verifier.py only enforces 'Steps to Reproduce' and 'Expected Result' (line 127). The verifier will pass without 'Actual Result' present.
